fixtures.description: Lex-only ASCII stress input with long identifiers, strings, comments, whitespace, and punctuation-heavy expressions.
Lex-only mixed-script input that forces Unicode scalar-index fallback across the complete stream.
Kotlin FIR test fixture with anonymous visitor object, overrides, labeled returns, smart-cast style flow, and nested assertions.
Coroutine Flow limit operators with suspend inline extension functions, crossinline lambdas, anonymous collectors, and labeled returns.
Ktor OpenAPI routing tests with deeply nested route DSL lambdas, annotations, collection literals, and JSON assertion builders.
Ktor OpenAPI security-scheme inference tests with nested plugin/routing/authentication DSLs, generics, maps, and chained assertions.
WPF control column implementation with attributes, dependency-property metadata, overrides, and property-heavy class structure.
Mono compiler backend code with nested visitors, switch-heavy control flow, casts, generics, and nullable preprocessor regions.
Mono compiler anonymous-type and expression-tree lowering code with nested classes, generic type construction, and lambda-oriented paths.
Mono compiler statement binder and emitter code with deep statement forms, nested classes, switch paths, and exception-flow constructs.
Lex-only ASCII range stress input with long identifiers, decimal and hexadecimal numbers, whitespace, mixed identifier lengths, and punctuation-heavy expressions.
Lex-only ASCII range stress input isolating long decimal and hexadecimal literals plus horizontal and newline whitespace runs.
DataFixerUpper algebraic result type with a sealed generic interface, nested records, higher-kinded-style generics, lambdas, method references, and default interface methods.
Bazel Skyframe retrieval state machine with sealed interfaces, nested records, async generic futures, nested switch statements, annotations, and staged control flow.
Closure Compiler JavaScript property model with sealed interfaces, nested records, nullable/type-use annotations, switch expressions, pattern alternatives, and overloaded constructors.
Trino columnar filter evaluator with a sealed interface, record result type, pattern switch expressions with when guards, yield blocks, lambdas, nested generics, and static factory flow.
Trino TPC-DS query 64 with multiple CTEs, wide select lists, broad joined relations, HAVING, BETWEEN predicates, and long ORDER BY clauses; benchmark placeholders are normalized to identifiers.

Trino TPC-DS query 47 with chained CTEs, window functions, partitioned ORDER BY, self-joins over CTE aliases, CASE expressions, DECIMAL literals, and LIMIT; benchmark placeholders are normalized to identifiers.

Trino TPC-DS query 74 with a CTE containing UNION ALL branches, repeated CTE self-joins, arithmetic expressions, nested CASE comparisons, ORDER BY, and LIMIT; benchmark placeholders are normalized to identifiers.

Trino TPC-H query 21 with correlated EXISTS and NOT EXISTS subqueries, multi-table FROM lists, grouped aggregation, qualified aliases, ORDER BY, and LIMIT; benchmark placeholders are normalized to identifiers.

Curated Trino TPC-DS grammar-stress suite combining the 40 benchmark queries with the highest feature score for CTEs, windows, UNION, EXISTS, CASE, grouping, HAVING, ORDER BY, intervals, BETWEEN, IN, and CAST; benchmark placeholders are normalized to identifiers.
